parents.subject: LU-10554 lnet: Remove LASSERT on userspace data

commit.subject: LU-8346 obdclass: debug patch
commit.message:
LU-8346 obdclass: debug patch

Debug patch to collect more logs.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly alwaysuploadlogs austeroptions=-R \
envdefinitions=ENABLE_QUOTA=yes,DEBUG_SIZE=64 \
clientcount=2 osscount=2 mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 \
austeroptions=-R mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs \
testlist=conf-sanity,conf-sanity,conf-sanity,conf-sanity,conf-sanity

Change-Id: Ibcb7f88347985b7113e38a59d3ee4a6742bbd83a
Signed-off-by: Hongchao Zhang <hongchao.zhang@intel.com>
